name: brain-alert-ops
description: AI brain pack for building event-driven operational alerting systems. Transforms passive notification pipelines into real-time, structured, routable, and actionable alert systems — covering event schema design, severity classification, AI voice escalation (Azure ACS/Vapi/Synthflow), adaptive card actions, ITSM auto-creation, state tracking, on-call rotation, engineer onboarding, and operational runbooks.

skills.name: alert-event-schema-designer
skills.description: Design structured JSON event schemas for operational alerts. Transforms unstructured email/text alerts into routable events with severity, site, metric, status, and lifecycle fields. Includes Power Automate email-to-schema parser and domain extensions for RF/telecom, SCADA, and IT infrastructure.

skills.name: severity-classifier-builder
skills.description: Build severity classification logic — keyword matching, threshold-based rules, AI-assisted classification via Claude API, and multi-factor scoring with site criticality and time-of-day modifiers. Includes classification rule documentation template.

skills.name: ai-voice-escalator
skills.description: Build AI voice call escalation for CRITICAL alerts. Three implementation paths: Azure Communication Services (enterprise native), Vapi (developer, fastest), Synthflow (no-code). Includes full Power Automate integration, escalation chain logic, and enterprise procurement guidance.

skills.name: adaptive-card-actioner
skills.description: Build actionable Teams adaptive cards — acknowledge, escalate, create ticket directly from Teams. Full card JSON, card update on acknowledgment, Power Automate response handler, severity-based card styling.

skills.name: incident-auto-creator
skills.description: Auto-create ITSM incidents from CRITICAL alerts — ServiceNow and Jira via REST API (no premium connector). Bidirectional status sync, incident templates by alert type, deduplication to prevent duplicate tickets.

skills.name: acknowledgment-state-tracker
skills.description: Track alert lifecycle state — OPEN/ACKNOWLEDGED/ESCALATED/RESOLVED. Three storage options: SharePoint (free), Dataverse, Azure Table Storage. Deduplication, flapping suppression, SLA measurement and reporting.

skills.name: on-call-rotation-manager
skills.description: Manage on-call schedules and route alerts to the right engineer. SharePoint schedule list, Power Automate lookup by team/specialty/time, business hours vs after-hours logic, escalation contact resolution by level.

skills.name: ops-runbook-writer
skills.description: Generate operational runbooks for alert response, system architecture documentation, and handover packages. Templates for signal degradation, connectivity loss, equipment failure, escalation paths, and system failure modes.

skills.name: oncall-engineer-onboarding
skills.description: Set up the mechanism for on-call engineers to register themselves into the alerting system. Covers Microsoft Teams Shifts setup with Graph API query, self-registration via Microsoft Forms with overlap validation, phone number storage options (Entra profile vs SharePoint), test call feature, and engineer offboarding procedures.
